Statement : Now I have found the directors of the movies featuring the actors from 'The Singing Detective'. The answer to the claim is as follows:
- Barry Levinson directed 'Toys' starring Robin Wright.
- Luis Mandoki directed 'Message in a Bottle' starring Robin Wright.
- Keith Gordon directed 'The Singing Detective' starring Mel Gibson.
- Anthony Minghella directed 'Breaking and Entering' starring Robin Wright.
- Sean Penn directed 'The Crossing Guard' starring Robin Wright.
- Nick Cassavetes directed "She's So Lovely" starring Robin Wright.
- Robert Redford directed 'The Conspirator' starring Robin Wright.
- Jeff Stanzler directed 'Sorry, Haters' starring Robin Wright.
- Pen Densham directed 'Moll Flanders' starring Robin Wright.
- Gillies MacKinnon directed 'The Playboys' starring Robin Wright.
- Phil Joanou directed 'State of Grace' starring Robin Wright.
- Robert Zemeckis and Graham Baker directed 'Beowulf' starring Robin Wright.
- Wim Wenders directed 'The Million Dollar Hotel' starring Mel Gibson.
- Tim Burstall directed 'Attack Force Z' starring Mel Gibson.
- Brian Helgeland directed 'Payback' starring Mel Gibson.
- Nick Park and Peter Lord directed 'Chicken Run' starring Mel Gibson.
- Steve Miner directed 'Forever Young' starring Mel Gibson.
- Robert Towne directed 'Tequila Sunrise' starring Mel Gibson.
- Peter Weir directed 'The Year of Living Dangerously' starring Mel Gibson.
- Nancy Meyers directed 'What Women Want' starring Mel Gibson.
- Roger Spottiswoode directed 'Air America' starring Mel Gibson.
- George Miller and George Ogilvie directed 'Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome' starring Mel Gibson.
- Jodie Foster directed 'The Beaver' starring Mel Gibson.
- Mel Gibson directed 'The Man Without a Face' starring Mel Gibson.
- Roger Donaldson directed 'The Bounty' starring Mel Gibson.
- Richard Donner directed 'Conspiracy Theory', 'Maverick', 'Lethal Weapon 2', and 'Lethal Weapon 3' starring Mel Gibson.
- Adrian Grunberg directed 'Get the Gringo' starring Mel Gibson.
- Various directors directed 'Hamlet' starring Mel Gibson.
- John Badham directed 'Bird on a Wire' starring Mel Gibson.
- Gillian Armstrong directed 'Mrs. Soffel' starring Mel Gibson.
- Ron Howard directed 'Ransom' starring Mel Gibson.
- Lewis Milestone and Martin Campbell directed 'Edge of Darkness' starring Mel Gibson.
- Robert Rodriguez directed 'Machete Kills' starring Mel Gibson.
- M. Night Shyamalan directed 'Signs' starring Mel Gibson.
- Roland Emmerich and Dean Semler directed 'The Patriot' starring Mel Gibson.
- Mark Rydell, Jean Renoir, and Jarmo Lampela directed 'The River' starring Mel Gibson.
- Randall Wallace directed 'We Were Soldiers' starring Mel Gibson.

- George Miller directed "Mad Max" starring Mel Gibson.
- Lewis Milestone and Martin Campbell directed "Edge of Darkness" starring Mel Gibson.

- Roland Emmerich and Dean Semler directed "The Patriot" starring Mel Gibson.
- Mark Rydell, Jean Renoir, and Jarmo Lampela directed "The River" starring Mel Gibson.
- Randall Wallace directed "We Were Soldiers" starring Mel Gibson.
